div.p: No specific dashboard available. Contact admin to set identity_type.

div.small: You have overdue document(s) that need immediate attention.

t.t-value: 100 if (best_program.stage_code == 'visa_processing' and best_program.visa_state in ['approve', 'reject']) else 100 if best_program.stage_code == 'done' else 80 if (best_program.stage_code == 'visa_processing' and best_program.visa_state == 'apply') else 60 if (best_program.stage_code == 'final_offer' and best_program.final_offer_state == 'received') else 60 if best_program.stage_code == 'visa_documentation' else 40 if (best_program.stage_code == 'final_offer' and best_program.final_offer_state != 'received') else 40 if best_program.stage_code == 'tuition_fee' else 40 if best_program.stage_code == 'gs_state' else 40 if best_program.stage_code == 'sponsor_document' else 40 if best_program.stage_code == 'offer_letter' else 40 if (best_program.stage_code == 'applied' and best_program.apply_state == 'submit') else 20 if (best_program.stage_code == 'applied' and best_program.apply_state in ['in_progress', 'pending']) else 20 if best_program.stage_code == 'confirmed' else 0

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.stage_code == 'done' else 'primary' if program.stage_code in ['applied', 'confirmed'] else 'warning' if program.stage_code in ['submitted', 'draft'] else 'danger' if program.stage_code == 'cancelled' else 'info' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.apply_state == 'submit' else 'info' if program.apply_state == 'in_progress' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.offer_letter_state == 'accepted' else 'info' if program.offer_letter_state == 'issued' else 'danger' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.sponsor_and_document_state == 'file_ready' else 'info' }}

badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.gs_state == 'approve' else 'danger' if program.gs_state == 'reject' else 'warning' if program.gs_state == 'revised' else 'info' if program.gs_state == 'in_progress' else 'secondary' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.tuition_fee_state == 'paid' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.final_offer_state == 'received' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.visa_documentation_state == 'ready' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.visa_state == 'approve' else 'danger' if program.visa_state == 'reject' else 'info' }}

badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.stage_code == 'done' else 'primary' if program.stage_code in ['applied', 'confirmed'] else 'warning' if program.stage_code in ['submitted', 'draft'] else 'danger' if program.stage_code == 'cancelled' else 'info' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.apply_state == 'submit' else 'info' if program.apply_state == 'in_progress' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.offer_letter_state == 'accepted' else 'info' if program.offer_letter_state == 'issued' else 'danger' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.sponsor_and_document_state == 'file_ready' else 'info' }}

badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.gs_state == 'approve' else 'danger' if program.gs_state == 'reject' else 'warning' if program.gs_state == 'revised' else 'info' if program.gs_state == 'in_progress' else 'secondary' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.tuition_fee_state == 'paid' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.final_offer_state == 'received' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.visa_documentation_state == 'ready' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if program.visa_state == 'approve' else 'danger' if program.visa_state == 'reject' else 'info' }}

t.div: You haven't applied to any programs yet.

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light text-primary stretched-link fw-bold shadow-sm

a.class: list-group-item list-group-item-action d-flex align-items-center px-0 border-0

div.p: Your user account () is not linked to any student record.
Please contact the administrator to link your account.

table.class: table table-bordered table-hover align-middle bg-white shadow-sm rounded

span.t-attf-class: badge bg-{{ 'success' if prog.apply_state == 'submit' else 'info' if prog.apply_state == 'in_progress' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if prog.offer_letter_state == 'accepted' else 'info' if prog.offer_letter_state == 'issued' else 'danger' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if prog.sponsor_and_document_state == 'file_ready' else 'info' }}

badge bg-{{ 'success' if prog.gs_state == 'approve' else 'danger' if prog.gs_state == 'reject' else 'warning' if prog.gs_state == 'revised' else 'info' if prog.gs_state == 'in_progress' else 'secondary' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if prog.tuition_fee_state == 'paid' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if prog.final_offer_state == 'received' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if prog.visa_documentation_state == 'ready' else 'warning' }}
badge bg-{{ 'success' if prog.visa_state == 'approve' else 'danger' if prog.visa_state == 'reject' else 'info' }}

table.class: table table-bordered table-hover align-middle bg-white shadow-sm rounded
